clean_justification: Cross-artifact coherence audit of the v2 conversational-search gap-closure campaign against plan-v2-final-state-gap-closure.md. All 27 Implementation-Checklist IDs graded: 25 PASS with a substantiating-artifact pointer each, 2 (C-20, C-21/C-22) graded forward-obligation-not-yet-violable (live bring-up evidenced; commit subtask 15 not yet run, nothing staged). Bucket B (Production Rollout Safety) confirmed CONSCIOUSLY DEFERRED in BOTH plan (Deferred section, line 1010) and conformance report (Remaining Caveats, line 150) with an operator handoff checklist — not graded as failure. The two deferred clause-by-clause reconciliations the conformance report explicitly handed to this audit were performed and CONFORM: (1) Live tier values vs tier-vocabulary-reconciliation.md ratified mapping — shapeable->refinement_chips_with_hatch (V2 guitar, all four multilang reads), exploratory->question_led (V5 accessories), intractable->hard_fork (V6 direct renderer), zero_results extra-state (V1 Yamaha, correctly NOT a 5th tier); decisive->refinement_chips not observed live, which the reconciliation doc itself flags as a probe-coverage gap (not a reachability gap, code-proven reachable) — NO divergence. (2) Live dispatch/localization/gap-7-safety vs multilingual-mode-detection-architecture.md — C-11 unsafe hard-short-circuit (sk/cs, llm_call_count=0, English-language-agnostic refusal prose) matches contract A4 exactly (contract scopes output prose OUT; refusal renders English even in sk/cs, which conformance Gap-7 row confirms verbatim); C-10/C-12 language-aware dispatch substantiated by code (_resolve_request_language + per-language en/sk/cs YAMLs present in mode_detection.py). Output localization of takeover/deflect prose seen live in the conformance report is Subtask 8 / C-27's deliverable, complementary to (not contradicting) the input-dispatch contract whose A4 explicitly delegates output prose to Subtask 8. NO cross-artifact contradiction found across the six reports: the gap-8 verification report's BRANCH-A 'implementation required' verdict and the conformance report's Gap-8 PASS are correctly time-ordered (early-gate divergence finding -> Subtask-4 fix per C-13/C-14, validated by validate-subtask-4.json which traces config.py:86 composition_table_live flip + exploratory->question_led table) — NOT stale-resolved drift. Topology: three separate git repos confirmed (outer luigis-box worktree, agent conversational-search @ feat/v2-campaign-rebased, nested conversational-proxy @ reconcile/proxy-v2-the-rest-on-origin-master); proxy appears untracked from the agent repo (correct boundary); the mode_detection.py-file + mode_detection/-directory coexistence is the INTENDED structure per architecture contract lines 35-41 with NO import ambiguity (the directory holds only YAML data files and no __init__.py, so it is not a Python package and cannot shadow the .py module). Stray artifacts (agent_diff.txt, runs/, dump.rdb, proxy.log, uv.lock.local-pre-ff-2026-06-01) remain untracked and unstaged. Scanned 6 cross-report artifacts + 5 prior sidecars + both nested-repo git states + on-disk mode_detection module/data layout + en.yaml gap-2 advice phrase; zero contradiction, zero stale-resolved, zero topology-defect gaps is a coherent state because every checklist ID maps to a named substantiating artifact, the two contract reconciliations conform, the one apparent gap-8 PASS-vs-FAIL tension resolves on time-ordering, and the one apparent localization tension resolves on the contract's explicit A4 scope split.
